title: ToolSwap
description: Instantly switches to the correct tool the moment you start mining.
body:
ToolSwap automatically detects when you're actually trying to break a block and swaps to the correct tool from your inventory.

The mod checks if you're truly mining a block before switching items, so it feels smooth and natural during gameplay instead of constantly swapping tools at random.

If you accidentally hit the ground while fighting mobs, don't worry — ToolSwap won't instantly pull out a shovel or another tool unless you're actually holding down and breaking the block.

It also works directly from your inventory, so your tools don't need to stay in the hotbar all the time.
